title: If Eva Characters Were Pudding What Kind Would They Be

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Mar 27, 2010 9:34 pm Misato- Booze and instant noodles. Ritsuko- Smokes, coffee and cats. Kaji- Sex and bullets.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Mar 27, 2010 9:41 pm You are delicious , Ikari-kun. O_O

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Mar 27, 2010 9:46 pm ^ That conjures veerry weird images.

[]: Post by ran1 » Sat Mar 27, 2010 10:05 pm Asuka = German Chocolate Shinji = Semen flavored A tad surprised no one has mentioned those two yet. Oh, and EoE Hyuga would be blackalicious.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 27, 2010 10:22 pm Clearly Asuka's would be something along the lines of Rote Grütze. Only 5 people here might get the reference/joke but that's okay. >_>

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Mar 27, 2010 10:43 pm NO.
